content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
June 12, 2002

Joseph Remcho
Remcho, Johansen & Purcell
201 Dolores Avenue
San Leandro, CA 94577

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-153

Dear Mr. Remcho:

We are in receipt of your request for reconsideration of advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹ in response to Wasson Advice Letter No. I-02-048, dealing with candidate transfers during the 'Wesson for Assembly' campaign. As this question relates to the past conduct of Assemblyman Wesson, we are unable to provide you with a written response (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

I also enclose a copy of Miller Advice Letter No. W-02-136, referenced in your letter.

Should you have any additional questions on this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

JWW:jg
Enclosures

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
